name: Buddy Hackett
bio: Buddy Hackett was an American comedian and comic actor known for his raunchy material, thick New York accent, and distinctive slurred delivery. A favorite of the nightclub and Las Vegas circuits and a frequent late-night guest, he was famous for routines such as The Chinese Waiter and later voiced Scuttle in The Little Mermaid.

timeline.ev: Begins performing stand-up after WWII Army service
Plays Marcellus Washburn in The Music Man
Appears in It's a Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad World
Voices Scuttle in The Little Mermaid

accolades: Frequent guest on Jack Paar's and Johnny Carson's Tonight Show
Star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame

bits.sp: The Tonight Show Starring Johnny Carson

bits.yt_title: Buddy Hackett's Legendary Duck Joke | August 27th, 1987 #johnnycarson
